title: crawl4ai
summary: Crawl4ai understands the operational realities of web crawling that document parsers ignore: anti-bot detection (3-tier with proxy escalation), crash recovery for long crawls (resume_state + on_state_change callbacks), deep crawl strategies (BFS/DFS with max-pages), Shadow DOM flattening, consent popup removal.  The resume_state pattern directly addresses Gap Agent A Q5 (progressive/resumable extraction).
creator_view: Crawl4ai understands the operational realities of web crawling that document parsers ignore: anti-bot detection (3-tier with proxy escalation), crash recovery for long crawls (resume_state + on_state_change callbacks), deep crawl strategies (BFS/DFS with max-pages), Shadow DOM flattening, consent popup removal. The resume_state pattern directly addresses Gap Agent A Q5 (progressive/resumable extraction). Apache-2.0 is a major advantage over firecrawl's AGPL.
creatorLens: Crawl4ai understands the operational realities of web crawling that document parsers ignore: anti-bot detection (3-tier with proxy escalation), crash recovery for long crawls (resume_state + on_state_change callbacks), deep crawl strategies (BFS/DFS with max-pages), Shadow DOM flattening, consent popup removal. The resume_state pattern directly addresses Gap Agent A Q5 (progressive/resumable extraction). Apache-2.0 is a major advantage over firecrawl's AGPL.

context.t28Relevance: Fills Gap Agent A Q5 (progressive/resumable extraction) via resume_state. Anti-bot and crash recovery are real-world operational patterns. Apache-2.0.
notablePatterns: resume_state + on_state_change — crash recovery for long-running crawls
Deep crawl BFS/DFS strategies with max-pages
LLM extraction with natural language questions
